name: incident.io Incident Management MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for incident.io — the modern incident management platform built on Slack. Enables AI agents to create incidents, update status, manage escalations, retrieve post-mortems, and query incident history. incident.io is popular with engineering teams for its Slack-native workflow and rich post-incident review features.
use_cases: Declaring incidents and updating severity from AIOps alert management agents
Querying incident history and metrics from reliability engineering agents
Retrieving post-mortem templates and generating incident summaries from documentation agents
Managing on-call schedules and escalations from incident response automation agents
not_for: Non-incident alerting (incident.io is specifically for incident response workflows)
High-volume automated incident creation without human trigger (anti-pattern)
Teams not using Slack as primary communication platform
best_when: An engineering team using incident.io wants AI agents to enhance incident workflows — providing context, generating summaries, and managing documentation during active incidents.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Autonomous incident declaration affects team alerting and customer communications. Human judgment required for incident severity classification.

auth.notes: incident.io API key authentication. Keys generated per organization in incident.io settings. Read-only keys available for observation-only agents.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for small teams (up to 5 seats); paid for larger teams
pricing.notes: Startup-friendly pricing. API access included with all plans.

performance.rate_limits: incident.io API: rate limits documented; generous for most use cases

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Incident declaration and severity changes affect production alerting
Official MCP server from incident.io team — well-maintained
Customer-facing incidents require human approval before external communications
Post-mortem data includes sensitive internal root cause analysis
Slack-native platform — incident workflow integrates with Slack channels
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Incident management with production alerting and customer communications. SOC2 and GDPR. Human approval required for customer-facing updates.

security_score_components.security_notes: Incident management with production alerting. SOC2 and GDPR. Post-mortems contain sensitive RCA data. Customer communications require human approval.
